note: Phase 1/2/3 map to skill1/skill2/burst and are unlocked sequentially by item count (Phase 2 @50, Phase 3/burst @110). They occupy separate skill slots and coexist once unlocked, so the strongest steady state (long solo raid) has all three active — modeled as such. skill1 overridden to recover the dropped 'Critical Rate of normal attacks 14.64%' team buff (lastBullet); the 14.31% gauge fill is kept, and the 0.59% Max HP full-charge heal is now MODELED (2026-07-14, owner) as a `heal` effect (event-only, no HP value) — it is NOT defensive-noise here: it emits a recovery event to all allies every full charge (~1.5s), which drives Crown's 'when recovery takes effect → team ATK ▲ 20.99%' to near-permanent uptime. Skipping it left every Crown+Helm team ~15% cold on the DPS supports (found via the neutral control-frame test). skill2 parses faithfully (parts-damage inert, full-burst attack-damage, full-charge bonus hit) and is omitted. burst overridden to give the 158.4% Charge Damage buff a finite duration approximating its 'for 10 round(s)' limit (~13s of charge shots) instead of the parser's permanent buff, and to skip the 54.45% HP-recovery (defensive). Burst nuke targets the boss (highest ATK). CORRECTION: the burst's 158.4% Charge Damage (max-rank Treasure) multiplies BASE charge damage (x2.5 -> +396 points), per the collection-item charge rule -> stat chargeDamageMultPct. CHARFIX: real SR fire cycle = 1.0s charge + ~0.5s bolt recovery -> chargeFrames 90 (the DB records charge only for some SRs; liberalio's DB value is already 90); validated helm 1.40->0.99 (neutral T6), 1.42->1.01 (T3), 1.15->0.89 (T4, ammo-cut-distorted). Q8 UPDATE: charFixes removed — the universal SR bolt-recovery rule (60f charge + 30f recovery) reproduces the validated 90-frame cycle.
